name: lucide-animated
title: Lucide Animated
description: Browse, search, and copy animated Lucide icons for your projects.
author: shivraj-roy

commands.name: search-icons
commands.title: Search Animated Icons
commands.subtitle: Lucide Animated
commands.description: Search, preview, and copy animated Lucide icons for your projects

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
